ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workshops" (
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workshop */,
  "workshop_name" TEXT /* Name of the workshop */,
  "workshop_type" TEXT /* Type of the workshop (e.g., Data Science, Machine Learning) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the workshop was conducted */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor or organizer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workshop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workshop */,
  "workshop_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workshop in hours */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if registration is open */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the workshop is open to the public or private */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the workshop (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workshop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the participant belongs to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "is_registered" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant is registered */,
  "is_attended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant attended the workshop */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., student, professor, industry professional) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the participant */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback question */,
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workshop the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., rating, text) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question is required */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the question appears in the feedback form */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., content, instructor, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_questions_workshop_id FOREIGN KEY ("workshop_id") REFERENCES workshops ("workshop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., rating on a scale) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response (if applicable) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the response is anonymous */,
  "response_category" TEXT /* Category of the response (e.g., content, instructor, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES feedback_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who gave consent */,
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workshop the consent is for */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the participant gave consent to share their responses */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent was given */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., share data, contact for follow-up) */,
  "contact_preference" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_workshop_id FOREIGN KEY ("workshop_id") REFERENCES workshops ("workshop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_ended_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open-ended feedback record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the feedback */,
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workshop the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the open-ended feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., content, instructor, organization) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_ended_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_ended_feedback_workshop_id FOREIGN KEY ("workshop_id") REFERENCES workshops ("workshop_id")
)
